name: notez
description: NoteZ mobile task and productivity manager

scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:build && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:check: node --check src/js/mobile-domain.js && node --check src/js/mobile-repository.js && node --check src/js/mobile.js && node --check scripts/build-mobile.js && node --check scripts/mobile-native-smoke.js
scripts.mobile:verify: npm run mobile:check && npm run mobile:build && npm run mobile:test
